bodySnippet: Leave ↔ Attendance Sync HRMS Leave Attendance Sync Filter Recalculate period Leave Ref Employee Dates Attendance rows LOP Sync status No leave in this period. LOP days carry IsLOP = 1 on the attendance row and flow to payroll at finalization. Use Recalculate period after a retroactive holiday/policy change to re-run the engine for the filtered month.
